title: M.E / M.Tech Jobs 2026 – DRDO Paid Internship
shortInfo: Defence Electronics Application Laboratory (DRDO DEAL) Recruitment 2026 for 45 posts of DRDO Paid Internship. Candidates with B.Tech./B.E./M.Tech./M.Sc Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 03-08-2026, and closes on 30-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DRDO DEAL official website drdo.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: DRDO DEAL Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 45 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Defence Electronics Application Laboratory (DRDO DEAL) Recruitment 2026 for 45 posts of DRDO Paid Internship. Candidates with B.Tech./B.E./M.Tech./M.Sc Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 03-08-2026, and closes on 30-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DRDO DEAL official website drdo.gov.in.

application_fee.details: No minimum or maximum age limit is specified in the official notification.

age_limit.details: No minimum or maximum age limit is specified in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E./M.Tech./M.Sc.(Electronics) final year students with CGPA >= 7.0 and no backlogs in the first 5 semesters.
qualification.details: B.Tech./B.E. (Engineering) students who have completed 3rd year / 6th semester or going to complete by July 2026. M.Tech./M.Sc.(Electronics) students who have completed 1st year / 2nd semester or going to complete by July 2026. Students with CGPA ≥ 7.0 on a scale of 10 (from AICTE approved College/Universities). No backlogs (failed) in any of the exams in the first 05 semesters of degree.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.drdo.gov.in/drdo/careers.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the DRDO Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DRDO Paid Internship is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for this internship?
faq.answer: Candidates must be final year B.Tech./B.E. or M.Tech./M.Sc.(Electronics) students. They should have completed their 3rd year/6th semester or 1st year/2nd semester respectively, with a CGPA of 7.0 or above and no backlogs.

faq.question: How will the selection be made for the DRDO Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based entirely on merit. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their academic performance and other eligibility criteria mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: What is the stipend offered for this internship?
faq.answer: Selected interns will receive a stipend of Rs. 30,000/- in two installments. Each installment will be Rs. 15,000/-, disbursed after the completion of 3 months and 6 months, provided the attendance requirement is met.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the DRDO Paid Internship?
faq.answer: There are a total of 45 vacancies for the DRDO Paid Internship across various engineering disciplines like Electronics & Communication, Computer Science, and Mechanical Engineering.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this DRDO Paid Internship is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via Speed Post to the specified address.

faq.question: Where is the Defence Electronics Application Laboratory (DEAL) located?
faq.answer: Defence Electronics Application Laboratory (DEAL) is located in Dehradun, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 248001.

faq.question: Is there any age limit for applying to this internship?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limit for candidates applying for this DRDO Paid Internship program.

faq.question: What documents need to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, which typically include a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant academic certificates. Please refer to the official notification for a complete list.

faq.question: Can I apply via email or online for this internship?
faq.answer: No, applications submitted via email or online will not be considered. Only offline applications sent through Speed Post to the designated address will be accepted.

seo_tags: Defence Electronics Application Laboratory Electronics & Communication Engineering
